quality.formatting_notes: Data structure is clean and complete.

mechanics.effect: Dissolves up to 1 square foot of adhesive.
mechanics.power_level: Appropriate for Legendary rarity (solves a very specific, high-level problem like sovereign glue).

recommendations.mechanical_clarification: The item's description is sufficient, but future items of this type might benefit from specifying if the liquid is consumed upon use (implied by 'the contents of the tube'). Assuming the tube is single-use based on the wording.

llm_audit.final_assessment: Consistent, high quality, and mechanically sound for a niche legendary item.
